channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Correspondents' Dinner Shooting Suspect Charged With Attempted Assassination
item.description: The man accused of opening fire at Saturday's White House Correspondents' dinner was charged Monday with attempting to assassinate President Trump.

item.title: Trump Resumes Press Tensions Within a Day of Correspondents' Dinner
item.description: A single pointed question from a reporter was enough to end a brief period of relative calm between President Trump and the Washington press corps.

item.title: Carbon Removal Industry Shifts Its Pitch to Align With Trump's Energy Priorities
item.description: Carbon removal companies are repositioning their messaging around energy security rather than climate goals in an effort to gain traction under the current administration.

item.title: DeSantis Releases New Florida Congressional Map Amid Redistricting Dispute
item.description: Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis's office signaled intent to redraw congressional districts in a way that would create additional Republican-leaning seats in the state.
